retrieved_result: Breeds Breeds The Ayrshire Breed The Ayrshire breed originated in the County of Ayr in Scotland prior to 1800, with the first importation to the U. S. around 1822. The breed is medium in size with various red and white markings. Dairymen appreciate Ayrshires because of their efficiency, udder quality, long
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about Ayrshire cattle breed, not related to Docker or computing.
